{{ $id := .Get "id" }} {{ $book := index .Site.Data.books $id }} {{ with $book }}
{{ with .cover_url }} {{ else }} {{ with .emoji }}{{ . }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ .title }}
{{ .author }}
{{ with .rating }}{{ $r := . }}
{{ range seq 1 5 }}{{ if le . $r }}★{{ else }}☆{{ end }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
